backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a per-user password vault with CRUD operations for logins, credit cards, secure notes, and identities, stored in a persistent map keyed by caller principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four implemented features (error boundary, auth guard, login error handling, actor null-safety) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Empty global CSS file at the frontend root level.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module, with the page title set to 'Cloud Vault on ICP'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in an ErrorBoundary and ThemeProvider, shows a loading spinner while Internet Identity initializes, then renders the TanStack Router with routes for landing, onboarding, vault, and security pages.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: Alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm permanent deletion of a named vault item, calling an onConfirm callback and closing on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/CreateItemDialog: Tabbed dialog for creating new vault items (login, card, note, identity) that calls the appropriate backend mutation, shows loading state, and displays success or error toasts.
frontend/src/components/EditItemDialog.t: Tabbed dialog pre-populated with an existing vault item's data that allows editing logins, credit cards, secure notes, and identities via backend update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component that catches runtime errors and displays a fallback UI with an error message and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying the current year, app name, and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with navigation to vault/security pages, theme toggle, logout button, and a user avatar dropdown showing the Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/components/ItemDetailDialog: Modal dialog that displays full details of a vault item (login, card, note, or identity) with copy-to-clipboard, show/hide password, edit, and delete actions.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGenerato: Dialog for generating random passwords with configurable length and character sets, showing a strength indicator and copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/VaultItemCard.ts: Card component for displaying a single vault item with its icon, title, subtitle, type badge, favorite indicator, and a dropdown menu for view/edit/delete actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating vault data (logins, credit cards, secure notes, identities) via the backend actor, invalidating the 'vault' query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page that presents the app's value proposition and a 'Get Started' button that triggers Internet Identity login, redirecting authenticated users to the vault.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Onboarding page shown after a successful first login, displaying vault setup confirmation steps and a button to navigate to the vault.
Security settings page displaying encryption status indicators and configurable security preferences such as auto-lock, accessible only to authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/VaultPage.tsx: Main vault page component that displays, filters, and manages all vault items (logins, credit cards, notes, identities) with tabs, search, and CRUD dialogs. Redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (app fails to load after deployment), and four existing fix features focused on error boundaries, auth initialization guards, resilient login button, and safe actor instantiation.
